figures.caption: Fig. 1. The sample comparison between (a) Previous diffusion-based video captioning approach and (b) Our proposed DiffVC.

TABLE I Video captioning model performance on MSR-VTT and MSVD datasets. - denotes that the data is not given in the corresponding literature. The bold number denotes the best results among all non-autoregressive methods.
Fig. 2. Comparison on generation speed between non-autoregressive and autoregressive video captioning. Autoregressive (AR) Captioner is KG-VCN [6].
Fig. 3. Comparison on generation quality between nonautoregressive and autoregressive video captioning, Autoregressive (AR) Captioner is KG-VCN [6].
Fig. 5. Case study on MSR-VTT for video captioning. ‘GT’ denotes the ground-truth caption, and ‘NACF’ denotes the caption generated by NACF [12].

Fig. 4. The overall architecture and key modules of our proposed DiffVC. (a) is the overall architecture of DiffVC, the string in italics denotes the generated caption of a video. (b) is the architecture of the discriminative denoiser. (c) is the architecture of the non-autoregressive language model.
